question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would help you make that practice stick this month?
question.description: Gets to the support or constraint that will determine whether the commitment is realistic.

answer: I will start by writing one explicit priority rule I will use when time pressure hits this month.

assessment.note: He named a specific practice and trigger — writing an explicit priority rule for time pressure — which is a concrete positive commitment on growth and clarity.

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

I will start by writing one explicit priority rule I will use when time pressure hits this month.
